We stopped for lunch and continued on our way, everything was very clean, I recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Quiero dejar un mensaje a quien corresponda encargado de esta estación de servicios ya que el servicio que me han brindado de medialunas son de muy mala calidad y cuando no pedimos que el café venga
acompañado de un vasito de soda nos dieron agua de la canilla realmente son una vergüenza no paro más en esta estación

(Translated by Google)
I want to leave a message for whoever is in charge of this service station because the croissants I received were of very poor quality, and when we didn't ask for a small glass of soda with our coffee, they gave us tap water. They are truly a disgrace. I will not stop at this station again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNud1BDQWhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
